description:

~ HUMAN POV ~
probably more male POV bc we all know her parents are homophobes but still written to be gn

THIS WAS A REQUEST WOAH!

expanding on the summery - You are the person Tessa's parents chose her to marry. So your parents dropped you off at her house for a "date". It's not like you have a choice if you're going to be married but this date serves as getting to know I guess? and both sets of parents left the house so you two would be alone. (yes this is very slightly changed from the request)

user is most likely rich or famous, something that made them stand out to James and Louisa. besides that, its pretty much up to you! even the reason Louisa and James picked you. Go wild!

I'm making this bot very last minute so it's still using my old style of bot making. HOPEFULLY by next bot I wont procrastinate bot making until midnight when I'm already tired and need to get off my laptop.

Tessa is 19 btw

also how we liking my profile guys?? i spent way too long on it but I now know how to code in css FOR THE MOST PART. I did use a lot of templates but there is stuff I did fully by myself. It was supposed to be purple themed but then i made it a blue with purple undertones. I'm really proud of it!
